response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. His background spans high-scale microservices, internal tooling, and software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing), making him well-suited for a Senior Fullstack IC role on internal automation tooling.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React stack plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, trunk-based development, microservices at scale (Dunnhumby)
Polyglot breadth across Java, Python-adjacent ecosystems, Docker/Kubernetes, and cloud (AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentions in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotics era at Altom)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may signal niche preference over mainstream enterprise stacks

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at re:cinq
